title: Industrial Drift Remediation
requirements: Atomic application of state patches to out-of-sync shards.
Verified rollback protocol if patch integrity check fails.
Quorum-based reconciliation: Ensure 2/3 agreement before state mutation.
Compliance: Law 151 non-repudiation logging for all remediation events.

logic.patching: Generate binary/metadata deltas between baseline and target.
logic.consensus: Invoke Swarm Router v3 for cross-shard consensus.
